title: Mature privet reduction on clifftop villa boundary
summary: 12m Edwardian villa boundary privet reduced from 3.4m to 2.1m over two staged cuts. First stage completed; second scheduled autumn 2027. Filed s.211 notice with TDC in advance — property inside Broadstairs CA 2009 North extension.

title: Formative holly clip on churchyard-side boundary
summary: 24m holly hedge along a St Peter's parish-adjacent garden. First-pass formative cut, tapered face and rounded top for wind shed. Inside St Peter's CA; stems all under 75mm, so no s.211 required. Arisings to Margate HWRC.

title: Full renovation cut on neglected villa laurel screen
summary: 18m mature cherry laurel, previously untouched for 6+ years, brought back into proportion. Base regeneration expected across 12–18 months. Species handles hard reduction but looks rough during recovery; owner briefed and agreed.
